
# BMC Helix Operation Management Exporter

<!-- status autogenerated section -->
| Status        |           |

This exporter can be used to send metrics to BMC Helix Operation Management.

# Configuration

```yaml
bmchelix:
  endpoint: https://<your-helix-env.onbmc.com>
  api:
    access_key: <access-key>
    access_secret_key: <access-secret-key>
    tenant_id: <tenant-id>
```

# Payload Specification

```json
[
  {
    "labels": {
      "metricName": "<otel-metric-name>",
      "hostname": "<otel-resource-'host.name'-attribute>",
      "entityId": "OTEL:<otel-resource-'host.name'-attribute>:<otel-resource-'resource.id'-attribute]>",
      "entityTypeId": "<otel-resource-'resource.type'-attribute>",
      "entityName": "<otel-resource-'resource.name'-attribute>",
      "hostType": "server",
      "isKpi": "false",
      "unit": "<otel-metric-unit>",
      "source": "OTEL",
      "<any-other-otel-resource-attribute>": "<value>",
      "any-other-otel-metric-attribute": "<value>"
    },
    "samples": [
      {
        "value": <otel-metric-value>,
        "timestamp": <otel-metric-timestamp>,
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    // next metric
  },
  {
    // next metric
  }
]
```

## Payload Example

```json
[
  {
    "labels": {
      "metricName": "hw.status.ok",
      "hostname": "pc-nassim",
      "entityId": "OTEL:pc-nassim:connector_id=genbatterynt,firmware_version=46305039,id=0,info=pnp_device_id:_bth_ms_bthpan_6_17cf7cdc_0_2,model=dell_rxf9t3b,name=2770smpdell_rxf9t3b_dell_rxf9t3b,hw.parent.id=win32_scsicontroller.deviceid_pci_ven_8086_dev_a77f_subsys_0c021028_rev_00_3_11583659_1_70,hw.parent.type=enclosure,hw.type=battery",
      "entityTypeId": "OTEL",
      "entityName": "connector_id=genbatterynt,firmware_version=46305039,id=0,info=pnp_device_id:_bth_ms_bthpan_6_17cf7cdc_0_2,model=dell_rxf9t3b,name=2770smpdell_rxf9t3b_dell_rxf9t3b,hw.parent.id=win32_scsicontroller.deviceid_pci_ven_8086_dev_a77f_subsys_0c021028_rev_00_3_11583659_1_70,hw.parent.type=enclosure,hw.type=battery",
      "hostType": "server",
      "isKpi": "false",
      "unit": "",
      "source": "OTEL",
      "<any-other-otel-resource-attribute>": "<value>",
      "any-other-otel-metric-attribute": "<value>"
    },
    "samples": [
      {
        "value": <otel-metric-value>,
        "timestamp": <otel-metric-timestamp>,
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    // next metric
  },
  {
    // next metric
  }
]
```

## Customize entity mapping
